footer.tagline: Independent music media. Discovering emerging and established artists, exclusive interviews and music news.
home.heroText: Rise Music Mag explores the emerging and established artists shaping today's music scene.
home.universText: Every genre has its place, its story, its artists.
home.aDecouvrirText: The latest artists highlighted by the editorial team.
genre.pop.desc: French chanson and contemporary pop, melodies that stick.
genre.afro.desc: Afrobeat, amapiano and global pop, sounds that cross borders.
genre.dance.desc: Eurodance, house and electro, the energy of the dance floor.
genre.indie.desc: Bedroom pop and intimate folk, songwriting first and foremost.
genre.hybrid.desc: Theatrical pop and hybrid genres, the future doesn't fit in a box.
about.title: ABOUT
about.missionText: Rise Music Mag is driven by a simple conviction: music deserves to be told with as much care as it is created. Every artist featured is selected, listened to, and verified before publication.
about.val1Text: No editorial line dictated by a label or a sponsor.
about.val2Text: Every fact, every date, every link is checked before publication.
about.val3Text: Five musical worlds, from French-speaking and international scenes.
partenariats.title: PARTNERS
partenariats.text: Labels, press officers, artist management: Rise Music Mag is open to editorial collaborations (interviews, first listens, reviews). Every request is reviewed for fit with our editorial line.
partenariats.metaDesc: Labels, press officers, artists: propose a collaboration with Rise Music Mag.
contact.title: CONTACT
contact.metaDesc: Suggest an artist, an interview, or a collaboration to the Rise Music Mag editorial team.
contact.champsRequis: Please fill in all required fields
contact.envoiEchoue: Sending failed. Please try again in a moment, or email risemusicmag@proton.me directly.
contact.successText: Thank you {name}, the editorial team will get back to you shortly at {email}.
legal.title: LEGAL NOTICE
legal.editeurText: The Rise Music Mag website is published by Franck Barbas, a private individual acting in a non-professional capacity, domiciled in Elne, France. The site has no commercial activity and is therefore not registered (no business registration number). Contact: risemusicmag@proton.me.
legal.hebergementText: The site is hosted by Netlify, Inc. — 44 Montgomery Street, Suite 300, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA.
legal.propriIntText: All content (text, visuals, layout) on Rise Music Mag is protected. Artist visuals remain the property of their respective rights holders (labels, photographers, artists).
confidentialite.title: PRIVACY
confidentialite.donneesText: The contact form collects the name, email, and message voluntarily submitted by the visitor, solely to respond to their request.
confidentialite.cookiesText: Section to complete based on the analytics tools actually used (or their absence) once the site is live.
confidentialite.droitsText: In accordance with GDPR, you can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data via the contact form.

artistes.subText: From emerging talents to established artists, explore the French-speaking and international music scene across five genres.
